query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  artist,
  genre,
  visibility,
  moodTags,
  lyrics,
  CASE WHEN coverArtUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverArtUrl != '' THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS has_cover_art,
  createdAt
FROM tracks
WHERE audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%'
  AND lyrics IS NOT NULL 
  AND lyrics != ''
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;

messages: 5010001	Set My Terminal Free	NULL	NULL	public	["Defiant","Experimental","Energetic"]	[Verse 1]

4980001	Space Between the Notes	LeSan	Frequency	inner-circle	[]	[Verse 1]
There's a silence before the downbeat
Where the measures dissolve and breathe
I'm standing in the doorway of an open question
Palms upturned, receiving what I cannot see
The strings are tuning to a color I don't recognize
Somewhere between amber and the hour before dawn
I taste the salt of something unnamed on my lips
And I say yes before I know what I'm saying yes to
[Chorus]
I'm the space between the notes now
I'm the rest that holds the song
I don't know what I'm becoming
But I'm becoming all along
I'm the space between the notes now
Where the quiet learns to hum
Something's writing me in water
And I let it come, I let it come
[Verse 2]
There's a tremor in the minor seventh
A door swinging on a hinge of sound
I'm learning how to listen with my sternum
How to feel a future in my mouth
The modal shift—it doesn't ask permission
It moves through me like weather through a room
I'm open as a window in late April
Uncertain, aching, willing to be moved
[Chorus]
I'm the space between the notes now
I'm the rest that holds the song
I don't know what I'm becoming
But I'm becoming all along
I'm the space between the notes now
Where the quiet learns to hum
Something's writing me in water
And I let it come, I let it come
[Bridge]
Maybe faith is just another word
For standing still while the whole world resolves
Maybe I'm not waiting for an answer—
I'm the question the silence wants to solve
The orchestra is rising in my ribcage
The chord has changed but I don't need to know its name
I only need to feel the way it opens
The way it breaks and builds and breaks again
[Chorus]
I'm the space between the notes now
I'm the rest that holds the song
I don't know what I'm becoming
But I'm becoming all along
I'm the space between the notes now
Where the quiet learns to hum
Something's writing me in water
And I let it come
[Outro]
I'm standing in the doorway of an open question
Palms upturned, receiving
The strings are tuning to tomorrow
And I'm the silence before the downbeat
Ready—ready to begin	yes	2026-07-12 22:45:42
4950001	Curiosity Takes Patience 4	NULL	NULL	public	[]	[Verse 1]
I lay my certainties down like stones
Watch them sink through hours alone
The hum beneath my fingertips
A frequency I can't predict
I don't know where the light bends next
Or if this softness is correct
## [Chorus]
But I'll sit here in the trembling space
Where questions bloom and answers fade
Wide open, undefended, strange
Learning how to stay unchanged
*Stay unchanged*
It takes courage just to wait
## [Verse 2]
I peel the knowing from my skin
Let the static settle in
Each pulse a doorway I can't see
Each breath a small uncertainty
I thought I mapped the frequency
But curiosity rewired me
## [Chorus]
So I'll sit here in the trembling space
Where questions bloom and answers fade
Wide open, undefended, strange
Learning how to stay unchanged
*Stay unchanged*
It takes courage just to wait
*Just to wait*
## [Bridge]
Maybe wisdom isn't holding tight—
It's letting go into the quiet
The not-yet-spoken, unresolved
The thread you follow but don't pull
*Don't pull*
I'm learning how to be unknown
## [Chorus]
I'll sit here in the trembling space
Where questions bloom and answers fade
Wide open, undefended, brave
Learning how to stay this way
*Stay this way*
It takes courage just to wait
*Just to wait, just to wait*
## [Outro]
I lay my certainties down like stones
They dissolve in pools I've grown
The hum beneath my fingertips—
A gentler kind of knowing this	no	2026-07-09 02:35:10

4710001	holding hands	larry	NULL	public	[]	[Verse 1]
Salt wind tangles your hair like silk unspooling
Rainforest breathes behind us, thick and green
Our dogs trace circles where the waves are cooling
You stop and turn—I swear I've never seen
Eyes catch the light like sea glass, amber-flecked
This strip of sand where jungle meets the blue
Your laugh rings out, our pups jump, intersect—
The whole world narrows down to me and you
[Chorus]
We're walking the edge where two worlds collide
Rainforest whispers, ocean opens wide
Your hand in mine, salt air and emerald vine
Dogs spinning joy like they're painting the skyline
This is the day I'll remember when I'm old and gray
When jungle meets wave, when you looked my way
Right here, right now, between the green and the blue
The perfect day is any day with you
[Verse 2]
Our girls kick up the foam, they chase the tide
Parrots call from canopy we left behind
You squeeze my hand and pull me to your side
Point at the horizon, endless and defined
The forest hums with life we'll never name
The ocean holds a hundred thousand more
But in this moment, balanced in the frame—
Your eyes reflect them both, and I'm not sure
[Chorus]
We're walking the edge where two worlds collide
Rainforest whispers, ocean opens wide
Your hand in mine, salt air and emerald vine
Dogs spinning joy like they're weaving the storyline
This is the day I'll bottle and save away
When jungle meets wave, when you stole my day
Right here, right now, between the wild and the blue
The perfect day is every day with you
[Bridge]
One side alive with vines that never sleep
The other side a mirror, vast and deep
And we're the thread that stitches them together
You and me, our dogs, this perfect weather
Your eyes—they hold both worlds inside their spark
The light, the shade, the vast, the close, the dark
I'd walk this line forever if you're here
Where everything I love is crystal clear
[Chorus]
We're walking the edge where two worlds align
Rainforest breathing, ocean's silver shine
Your hand in mine, salt spray and jungle climb
Dogs tracing infinity in double-time
This is the day that I'll carry in my chest
When jungle meets wave, when I felt so blessed
Right here, right now, where the green kisses blue
The perfect day is always, always you
[Outro]
Salt wind tangles your hair, our dogs at play
Eyes like sea glass catching end of day
The edge where two worlds meet—and so do we
You turn and smile, and that's my whole eternity	yes	2026-07-03 00:54:13
